metric_definitions.goals: Shot events where shot.outcome.name is Goal.
metric_definitions.own_goals: Own Goal Against events assigned to the team that scored against itself.
metric_definitions.yellow_cards: Yellow Card and Second Yellow card events found in foul_committed or bad_behaviour.
metric_definitions.red_cards: Red Card and Second Yellow card events found in foul_committed or bad_behaviour.
metric_definitions.corners: Pass events where pass.type.name is Corner.
metric_definitions.free_kicks: Pass events where pass.type.name is Free Kick.
metric_definitions.goal_kicks: Pass events where pass.type.name is Goal Kick.
metric_definitions.throw_ins: Pass events where pass.type.name is Throw-in.
metric_definitions.penalty_shots: Shot events where shot.type.name is Penalty. Used as first version proxy for penalty awarded.

notes: Penalty shots are used instead of penalty awarded because they are directly identifiable from StatsBomb shot events.
Minute-level data contains only rows where at least one tracked metric exists.
Raw event-level match detail is loaded directly from StatsBomb Open Data by the frontend.
